themes.headline: Closing AUM crossed ₹8.5T; YoY growth 21%; ex-ETF share 12.8%
themes.detail: Actively managed equity-oriented assets crossed ₹5T (market share 12.8%, +19% YoY).

themes.headline: Unique investor penetration at 25%; added 0.5M of industry's 1M
themes.detail: Steady share-of-net-additions in line with prior quarter.

themes.headline: SIP AUM crossed ₹15T industry-wide; now 37% of active equity AUM
themes.detail: Monthly SIP contributions hit ₹273 bn in June '25; contributing accounts now 86.5M (vs 67M a year ago).

themes.headline: Industry: 52nd consecutive month of positive net flows in active equity
themes.detail: Debt funds ₹1.34T net inflow; liquid ₹609 bn; arbitrage ₹431 bn — broad-based fixed income recovery.
